XML: <panel id="panel-2676"><header><button action="cancel" kind="secondary" label="Cancel"/></header><body><field id="status-field" type="text" required="true" label="Status"/></body></panel>
Expectation: every button must have an id ending in -btn.
Fix: {"attr":"id","op":"set_attr","path":"/panel/header/button","value":"cancel-btn"}
